# Eliza VoiceInteractionService — assist invocation trace
# Device: emulator-5584 (Android 15 / API 35, Pixel-class AVD)
# Build:  packages/app-core/platforms/android assembleDebug (ELIZA_ANDROID_SKIP_FORK_LLAMA_LIB=1
#         compile-verification APK — no web bundle / no on-device inference lib; see NOTE below)
# Trigger: `adb shell cmd voiceinteraction show`  (invokes the ACTIVE digital-assistant VIS = Eliza)
#          KEYCODE_ASSIST (219) also invokes the same session but is debounced/flaky on the AVD.

## secure settings — Eliza IS the active system digital assistant (backed by the new VIS)
assistant                 = ai.elizaos.app/.ElizaVoiceInteractionService
voice_interaction_service = ai.elizaos.app/.ElizaVoiceInteractionService
role holder (ROLE_ASSISTANT) = ai.elizaos.app

# `cmd role add-role-holder android.app.role.ASSISTANT ai.elizaos.app` SUCCEEDED — the role
# framework only accepts packages that qualify as an assistant (valid VoiceInteractionService
# OR ACTION_ASSIST activity). Before this change the app had no VIS. The holder flipped from
# com.google.android.googlequicksearchbox -> ai.elizaos.app.

## logcat — session shown -> handoff -> app launch (deep-link spine, D1 source tag)
07-03 19:45:59.650 20417 20417 I ElizaMainActivity: startupTraceId=android-1783122359650-e39ef609-9951-4e8c-87c3-a85e6dc29d21
07-03 19:46:22.272 20417 20417 I ElizaVoiceInteraction: [ElizaVoiceInteractionSession] Assistant session shown (flags=3)
07-03 19:46:22.272 20417 20417 I ElizaVoiceInteraction: [ElizaVoiceInteractionSession] Handing off to Eliza: elizaos://voice?source=android-assistant-session&action=voice&voice=1

## top activity after handoff — the deep link LANDED in MainActivity
topResumedActivity=ActivityRecord{37bb831 u0 ai.elizaos.app/.MainActivity t53}
  Intent { act=android.intent.action.VIEW dat=elizaos://voice?source=android-assistant-session&action=voice&voice=1 flg=0x34000000 cmp=ai.elizaos.app/.MainActivity }

# Earlier in the session lifecycle the session-service factory also logged:
#   I ElizaVoiceInteraction: [ElizaVoiceInteractionSessionService] Creating Eliza assistant session

## NOTE — post-handoff ANR is expected for THIS APK, not a feature bug
# This is the skip-llama compile-verification APK: it ships no web renderer bundle
# (assets/public) and no on-device inference lib, so once MainActivity launches its WebView
# has nothing to load and the process ANRs ("Eliza isn't responding"). That does not affect
# the sub-issue-4 surface being proven here: the VoiceInteractionService is the active
# assistant, the session renders + fires, and the deep link lands in MainActivity with the
# distinct source=android-assistant-session tag. A full `bun run build:android` APK ships the
# renderer + engine and lands on the voice UI.
